meta.title: Our Coaches
meta.intro: Meet our expert coaching team with diverse specializations and decades of combined experience in personal development, leadership, and holistic wellness. Each coach brings unique expertise and passion to help you achieve your goals.
meta.description: Meet the Inner Power Academy coaching team - expert instructors with diverse backgrounds in mindfulness, leadership, and personal growth.

coaches.name: Dr. Ananya Sharma
coaches.title: Lead Mindfulness Coach
coaches.bio: Dr. Sharma brings 15 years of experience in mindfulness-based stress reduction and meditation techniques, having trained with leading experts in India and the United States.
education: M.A. in Contemplative Studies, Naropa University
experience: Lead Instructor, Mindfulness Based Stress Reduction Program (2015-present)

coaches.name: Michael Chen
coaches.title: Leadership Development Specialist
coaches.bio: Michael specializes in executive coaching and organizational leadership, with a track record of transforming Fortune 500 leaders and emerging entrepreneurs.

coaches.name: Sarah Thompson
coaches.title: Nutrition & Wellness Coach
coaches.bio: Sarah integrates holistic nutrition, yoga, and Ayurvedic principles to help clients achieve optimal physical and mental health through personalized wellness plans.
education: B.S. in Health Sciences, Boston University

coaches.name: James Okafor
coaches.title: Life Transitions Coach
coaches.bio: James guides clients through major life transitions with compassion and practical strategies, drawing from his background in psychology and personal experience with career pivots.
education: M.S. in Counseling Psychology, Columbia University
experience: Career Counselor, Columbia University Career Center (2013-2017)

coaches.name: Elena Rodriguez
coaches.title: Emotional Intelligence Coach
coaches.bio: Elena helps individuals and teams develop emotional intelligence skills, enhancing communication, empathy, and conflict resolution in personal and professional settings.
education: B.A. in Psychology, University of Miami
Certified EQ Coach, Institute for Social & Emotional Intelligence

coaches.name: David Kim
coaches.title: Creativity & Innovation Coach
coaches.bio: David unlocks creative potential in artists, entrepreneurs, and professionals through innovative coaching techniques that blend design thinking with mindfulness practices.
education: MFA in Design, Rhode Island School of Design
B.A. in Fine Arts, Yale University
experience: Adjunct Professor, Parsons School of Design (2016-present)

coaches.name: Lisa Patel
coaches.title: Mindset & Performance Coach
coaches.bio: Lisa works with athletes, executives, and high-achievers to develop a growth mindset, overcome mental barriers, and achieve peak performance in their respective fields.
education: M.S. in Sport Psychology, University of Oregon
B.S. in Kinesiology, Penn State University
Certified Performance Coach, International Coaching Federation
experience: Mental Performance Consultant, Professional Sports Teams (2010-2012)
